title: chionanthus macrophyllus var. attenuatus
intro: Chionanthus macrophyllus var. attenuatus, also known as the Chinese parasol tree, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving respiratory health. Chionanthus macrophyllus var. attenuatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being.
